query: SELECT s.skill_id, s.name, s.category, s.rarity, s.npc_id, n.name as npc_name, n.location, s.prerequisite_level, s.learn_cost FROM game_unified_skill_catalog s LEFT JOIN game_npc_catalog n ON s.npc_id = n.id WHERE s.usable_by_player = 1 ORDER BY s.category, s.rarity LIMIT 15
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT s.skill_id, s.name, s.category, s.rarity, s.npc_id, n.name as npc_name, n.location, s.prerequisite_level, s.learn_cost FROM game_unified_skill_catalog s LEFT JOIN game_npc_catalog n ON s.npc_id = n.id WHERE s.usable_by_player = 1 ORDER BY s.category, s.rarity LIMIT 15
